channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Uneven and sticking out rocks and bricks that are a trip hazard, I tripped up twice this week yesterday I hurt my ankle, needs concreting., 10th May
item.description:
As you go onto the field through the gate there's uneven and sticking out rocks and bricks that are a trip hazard, I tripped up twice this week yesterday I hurt my ankle, needs concreting also all gates to the field could do with a service just to keep secure and stop dogs running onto a road(just a spring on the gate would do)

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Halcot Avenue, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bedding, 10th May
item.description:
Bedding dumped last night with other rubbish put in our bins that hadn’t been emptied

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Manton Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

item.title: Bush covering path, 10th May
item.description:
There's a bush covering the path that needs cutting back. Also there needs to be a double yellow parking line there because when someone parks on the corner there you have to drive on the other side of the road and it's dangerous on a corner

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hither Farm Road, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet

item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load

item.title: Wooden Pallets Dumped outside Eagle Mansions, 10th May
item.description:
Since 30/04/26 these pallets have been left on the street. Can't think where they could have come from??? Not

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Pellerin Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti sprayed at 296 Brixton road SW9. The graffiti is against a cream wall and has been there for over a week. Please can it be removed. There is more graffiti on the very next corner on the side wall of Shapes Barber shop Brixton road SW9, 10th May
item.description:
I like to report graffiti sprayed at 296 Brixton road SW9 against a cream wall. The graffiti has been there for over a week. There is a similar tag on the very next turning on the side wall of Shapes Barber shop Brixton road SW9. Please can these be removed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 300-302, Brixton Road, Brixton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car park just in front of the traffic lights., 10th May
item.description:
This car is parked just in front of the traffic lights, blocking visibility blocking the lane, causing an obstruction so that that line of traffic has to wait and try and go round. The other lane is already full with people trying to turn right. This is not the first time it has happened in this exact spot on a Sunday and I suspect this to be the same car.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Church Street, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cars parked all over the street, 10th May
item.description:
Once again using this road to park where ever they like. When is this going to stop? From the extract from Holloway Road- down Elthorne Road into Ashbrook Road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 23, Ashbrook Road, Archway, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
